current_status: 7F GroupDRO (+ temperature-scaled confidence) is the primary CONTROLLED candidate; not yet frozen as final.
recommendation: Retain GroupDRO as primary candidate; freeze only at final-eval protocol time.
reason: Beat its matched ERM control on ood_val (AUROC 0.7129 vs 0.6180); first DG lever to do so.
risk_if_ignored: Testing an unvetted/undocumented model on ood_test; wasting the one-time test run.
next_action: Confirm candidate in final-eval protocol (Path B) before any ood_test.

current_status: 7F center-stratified ERM is the fair matched control (same sound 7F-1 cache).
recommendation: Keep as the controlled baseline; report alongside GroupDRO.
reason: Only matched baseline that isolates the GroupDRO objective from cache/subset differences.
risk_if_ignored: Losing the controlled comparison; reverting to an unfair (context) baseline.
next_action: Report ERM vs GroupDRO as the controlled comparison in all outputs.

current_status: old plain ERM / 7A / 7D / 7E are context-only (old confounded cache / different id_val subset).
recommendation: Report as context/reference only; never as controlled comparators for GroupDRO.
reason: Different training cache/subset; e.g. old plain ERM AUROC 0.7696 is a reference gap, not a controlled loss.
risk_if_ignored: Falsely claiming GroupDRO beats/loses to plain ERM in a controlled comparison.

current_status: 7G temperature scaling (GroupDRO T=3.6570) improves ECE/Brier/NLL but is fit+eval on the same ood_val subset (R7); argmax-invariant.
recommendation: Report as development-stage calibration; do NOT claim it generalizes.
reason: No separate calibration/eval split; optimistic estimate.
risk_if_ignored: Over-claiming calibration; leaky calibration estimate at test time.
next_action: Decide a validated calibration policy (separate split) before any final calibration claim.

current_status: Only candidate id_val-selected fixed-specificity points exist; NONE committed.
recommendation: Do not commit a clinical threshold yet.
reason: Candidate points are development-stage; no deployable threshold chosen.
risk_if_ignored: Committing a threshold that does not transfer to the unseen test hospital.
next_action: Optionally commit an operating point on ood_val later (gated), then freeze for test.

current_status: All OOD numbers are on a capped balanced ood_val subset (n=2000).
recommendation: Recommended before final test if compute/time allows (Path A).
reason: Capped subset fragility (R1/R4); larger ood_val de-risks the locked test.
risk_if_ignored: Final test conclusions resting on a small balanced subset.
next_action: Plan a larger/full id_val + ood_val development evaluation (inference only; no ood_test).

current_status: ood_test is LOCKED and unread; touched once at the very end.
recommendation: Do NOT run until final model+calibration+threshold are frozen AND explicitly authorized.
reason: Reserved-test discipline; single held-out generalization estimate.
risk_if_ignored: Burning the one-time test on an unfrozen configuration.
next_action: Run only after Path B protocol is frozen and written authorization is given.

current_status: Only GroupDRO tested; no CORAL/DANN (R3 residual).
recommendation: Optional (Path C); only if DG breadth is worth the training scope.
reason: Broader DG comparison further reduces R3 but adds training scope.
risk_if_ignored: Reviewer asks for DG breadth; single-method DG story.
next_action: Decide whether to add CORAL/DANN on the sound 7F-1 caches (gated).

recommendation: DEFERRED / optional (Path D); NOT the default next step.
reason: MC-dropout/ensemble not required to freeze candidate or run final test.
